category_sources: official GitHub README describes EncFS as an encrypted virtual filesystem using FUSE.

docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project site; official GitHub README provides usage documentation and links to DESIGN.md technical overview.

tags_sources: official GitHub README describes encrypted filesystem behavior, FUSE, and security-related storage use.
